findings: AGENTS.md documents full SS-250 commander behavior, nested progress, and child-agent telemetry in the expected commander directory.
AGENTS.md and README.md both explicitly say metaswarm must report partial rather than silently downgrading.
Docs align on isolated branch naming and atomic task-claim semantics.
Docs mention premium child-model overrides but do not spell out the premium pool or banned models.
Docs mention teardown, but detailed stop/recovery workflow is sparse.
